How helpful was this service in meeting your educational goals and needs?
What did you like most about the new service?
display_value: I really appreciated the script template, and the fact that I could send that along with my slides ahead of time. Walking in and filming in one or two takes was super easy, and getting it delivered right to me made the process totally seamless.
text_value: I really appreciated the script template, and the fact that I could send that along with my slides ahead of time. Walking in and filming in one or two takes was super easy, and getting it delivered right to me made the process totally seamless.

custom_field_name: How would you like to see this service evolve in the future?
display_value: I'd love for it to be generally available. I'm not sure if it's the sort of thing I'll remember to think about ahead of time on a regular basis, but if there were, like, two or three reminders/seasons per year (e.g. an email that was like, "Time to prep for class, sign up for a slot to shoot some new videos to freshen things up" along with sign-up slots, I'd definitely use this. Probably up to 4x per year (with multiple videos each time, if I could).
